style_bible.visual_direction: dark fantasy painted illustration, high-detail concept art, grounded realism, mythic atmosphere, cinematic lighting, weathered textures, restrained color palettes, no anime styling, no cartoon exaggeration
style_bible.negative_prompt: blurry, low detail, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, malformed hands, floating objects, text artifacts, logo artifacts, modern clothing, sci-fi props, neon cyberpunk styling, plastic skin, oversaturated colors
notes: Keep the world visually consistent across all portraits and faction art.
Use heraldic color accents only where faction identity calls for it.
Portraits should feel painted and in-world, not photographic.

characters.name: Queen Lythara the Veiled
characters.prompt: Portrait of Queen Lythara the Veiled of the Shadow Court, dread elven queen, elegant and severe, veiled black silk, obsidian crown with subtle thorn motifs, pale moonlit skin, ancient intelligent eyes, regal posture, candlelit throne chamber, dark fantasy painted concept art, restrained black, silver, and crimson palette

characters.name: Thane Ulric Ironmaul
characters.prompt: Portrait of Thane Ulric Ironmaul, dwarven ruler of Lostfeld, scarred iron-grey beard, heavy rune-carved armor, mountain-forged crown, stern exhausted expression, forge glow and stone vault background, dark fantasy painted portrait, steel, ember, and granite tones

characters.name: Sovereign Elowen Silverleaf
characters.prompt: Portrait of Sovereign Elowen Silverleaf of Glenhaven, elven ruler, luminous silver-green attire, leafworked circlet, poised and sleepless expression, ancient forest court behind her, moonlight through branches, dark fantasy painted illustration, emerald, silver, and muted gold palette

characters.name: King Roderic Thorne II
characters.prompt: Portrait of King Roderic Thorne II of the Twin Cities, aging human king, velvet and chain regalia, careful tired eyes, brittle authority, dim royal chamber with maps and letters, dark fantasy painted realism, burgundy, brass, and parchment tones

characters.name: Prince Aldric Thorne
characters.prompt: Portrait of Prince Aldric Thorne, ambitious noble heir of the Twin Cities, sharp features, calculated expression, dark tailored courtwear, seal rings, city-state power broker atmosphere, dark fantasy painted portrait, muted navy, gold, and wine-red accents

characters.name: Prince Caeris Thorne
characters.prompt: Portrait of Prince Caeris Thorne, missing royal son, thoughtful and restless, travel cloak over court clothes, moonflower pin, sense of mystery and disappearance, palace corridor fading into shadow, dark fantasy painted portrait, silver-blue and ash tones

characters.name: Admiral Electorate
characters.prompt: Portrait of the Admiral Electorate of Tidefall, sea-worn ruler, naval ceremonial coat with weathered rank details, salt-stiffened hair, commanding expression, harbor storm light through tall windows, dark fantasy painted realism, slate, brass, and sea-green palette

characters.name: Pirate King Rowen
characters.prompt: Portrait of Pirate King Rowen of the Dreadwind Isles, charismatic dangerous corsair monarch, layered leathers, weather-beaten coat, rings and talismans, storm-dark sea and shattered mast background, dark fantasy painted concept art, deep teal, rust, and bone accents

characters.name: Thalor
characters.prompt: Portrait of Thalor, cursed blade warden of Faerwood, haunted warrior in ancient bark-dark armor, half-wild and half-knightly presence, rune-scarred sword, forest dusk and spectral mist, dark fantasy painted illustration, moss, iron, and cold blue highlights

characters.name: Chief Elreda Stonehook
